data.raw: Add a customer feedback form: POST /api/feedback persists to a `feedbacks` table, render the form on `/feedback` with a success state.
reconstructed_ac: POST /api/feedback validates payload and persists to feedbacks
GET /feedback renders a form bound to forms.text-input
Successful submission swaps the form for a confirmation card
assumptions: feedbacks table is new; migration ships with this change
no admin moderation flow in this iteration
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/feedback validates payload and persists to feedbacks
GET /feedback renders a form bound to forms.text-input
Successful submission swaps the form for a confirmation card

questions: > Input: Add a customer feedback form: POST /api/feedback persists to a `feedbacks` tabl…
> 1. Confirm — lock this contract and advance to the UI track
> 2. Revise — send feedback; loops back to `contract-plan`

**Recommendation: 1 — Confirm** — the contract covers both required slots. Caveat: flip to 2 only if an entity field or endpoint signature is wrong; the UI track will treat this contract as immutable input.
